overview: Embark on a captivating Thailand escape with Travelxploria, where ancient pageantry and island paradise blend seamlessly into one unforgettable journey. Your adventure begins under a canopy of light and sound at the Siam Niramit Show, then at dawn you’ll set sail for Phi Phi Island’s ivory sands and turquoise waters, snorkeling vibrant coral reefs and hopping between hidden coves framed by towering limestone cliffs. From seaside thrills you’ll travel to Phuket’s storied heart—standing in awe before the marble serenity of the Big Buddha, exploring the gilded halls of Wat Chalong, and wandering the pastel streets of Old Phuket Town in search of fiery satay, sweet roti, and cooling iced tea. With insider access, seamless transfers, and the warmth of small-group camaraderie, Travelxploria ensures every moment—from epic legends to island dreams—becomes a lasting memory.

As you arrive in the breathtaking paradise of Phuket, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. Sit back and relax as you’re comfortably transferred to your hotel, where a smooth check-in at hotel in Bangkok. Take some time to unwind.

Later embark on an enchanting evening as you're collected from your hotel by a gracious Travelxploria representative—the trusted name in Thai travel—and whisked away to the mesmerizing Siam Niramit Phuket Show. Begin your night by indulging in an exquisite Thai-Western fusion feast, presented in an elegant buffet that delights both the palate and the senses. As darkness falls, witness a breathtaking spectacle where state-of-the-art technology harmonizes with age-old traditions on one of the world’s most dazzling stages. Capture vibrant snapshots of performers clad in traditional Thai attire, each moment more vivid than the last, and immerse yourself in a cultural walkthrough that unveils the rich tapestry of Thailand's heritage. With seamless, hassle-free transfers ensuring your comfort, this unforgettable experience promises to leave you with cherished memories of a truly magical evening.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Full Day Phi Phi Island Tour with Lunch

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Half Phuket City Tour
Ticket Included
Half Phuket City Tour
Ticket Included
Half Phuket City Tour
Ticket Included

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel as our Travelxploria representative ensures you have everything you need for a relaxing and flexible day in Phuket. Today is yours to explore at your own pace—whether you choose to wander through the charming Phuket Walking Street in Old Town, shop for souvenirs at Jungceylon Mall, or simply soak in the island’s vibrant energy. Take in the sights, indulge in delicious street food, or unwind by the beach. As the day winds down, return to your hotel for a delicious dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

After enjoying a hearty breakfast at your hotel, it’s time to bid farewell to the beautiful island of Phuket. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a smooth and comfortable transfer to the airport. Take a moment to cherish the incredible memories made—whether it’s the stunning beaches, vibrant markets, or unforgettable experiences. As you head to the airport, relax and reflect on your journey.

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • Accommodation on Twin sharing basis.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • A Visit to Phi Phi island
  • Phuket City Tour

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • Return Airfare
  • 5% TCS.
  • 5% GST.
